name: openclaw
description: Dual-chamber chest drainage bottle teaching game

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix apps/server run dev" "npm --prefix apps/h5 run dev -- --host 0.0.0.0"
scripts.build: npm --prefix apps/server run build && npm --prefix apps/h5 run build
scripts.build:edgeone: npm --prefix apps/h5 run build && node scripts/build-edgeone.mjs
